entry.title: UltrafastSecp256k1 v3.14.0
entry.summary:
The GPU benchmark results demonstrate the impressive cryptographic processing capabilities of a single RTX 5060 Ti graphics card. Specifically, it can perform up to 4.88 million Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (ECDSA) signing operations per second and up to 2.44 million ECDSA verification operations per second. In addition, this GPU showcases its efficiency with Schnorr signatures, achieving up to 3.66 million signing operations per second and 2.82 million verification operations per second.
These metrics are essential for understanding the GPU's potential in applications requiring high-volume, secure transaction processing, such as blockchain technology and encrypted communication. The RTX 5060 Ti's performance in both ECDSA and Schnorr cryptographic operations highlights its suitability for intensive computational tasks that require both speed and security.
Overall, the benchmark underscores the RTX 5060 Ti's capability as a powerful tool for developers and researchers working in fields where cryptography plays a crucial role. Its ability to handle millions of cryptographic operations per second makes it an invaluable asset for securing digital transactions and communications at a large scale.
